description: HTML file for a database visualization web interface, including UI components, styles, and client-side JavaScript for fetching and displaying database data.

methods.name: loadDatabases
methods.description: Fetches list of databases from server and populates the sidebar.

methods.name: refreshDatabases
methods.description: Refreshes the list of databases, resetting current selections.

methods.name: toggleDatabase
methods.description: Expands or collapses database node, loads tables if expanded.

methods.name: loadTables
methods.description: Fetches tables for selected database and updates UI.

methods.name: loadTableData
methods.description: Loads data for specific table and renders it.

methods.name: renderTable
methods.description: Constructs an HTML table from data array.

methods.name: renderCell
methods.description: Render individual cell content, handling nulls, objects, long strings.

methods.name: expandCell
methods.description: Handles expanding/collapsing long or object cells.
